title: SQL: LIMIT is broken
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE sequences (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM sequences FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY;
SELECT * FROM sequences OFFSET 1 ROWS FETCH NEXT 2 ROWS ONLY;
SELECT value FROM sequences WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM sequences FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY);
key_bug_features: LIMIT clause not functioning as expected
